meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no design skills (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no design skills. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for Design Skills
content.seo_description: Overcome a lack of design skills with this advanced Antigravity project template. A high-efficiency guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship fast.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting Figma and start shipping. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you decouple structural logic from aesthetic polish. Use Claude Code to inject pre-validated design systems into your codebase instantly, allowing you to deliver pixel-perfect, high-converting SaaS interfaces without ever opening a design tool.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the backend logic, the API integrations, and the database schema—but your UI looks like a relic from 1998. Clients demand modern, frictionless experiences, and the pressure to deliver aesthetic excellence without formal design training is a silent career killer.

Relief has arrived. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you treat UI as a modular configuration rather than a manual labor task. This workflow allows you to focus on high-leverage engineering while AI handles the visual hierarchy, typography, and responsive constraints, transforming your development process into a high-velocity, professional output machine.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundation by cloning the Antigravity boilerplate, which includes pre-configured Tailwind utility classes and component abstractions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity clean-slate template. Configure for Next.js 14 and Tailwind CSS with a focus on modular component architecture.

steps.title: Define Visual Constraints via JSON
steps.description: Instead of manually styling components, define your design tokens (colors, spacing, typography) in the Antigravity config file.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a theme configuration file based on a 'Professional SaaS' aesthetic. Include a primary color palette, 8px spacing scale, and a sophisticated font stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update theme.config.ts with professional saas tokens'

steps.title: Automate Component Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your functional requirements to the Antigravity component library, ensuring consistency across all pages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library. Include a sidebar, header, and main content area with empty slots for data tables.

steps.title: Inject Data-Driven UI Logic
steps.description: Connect your backend logic to the UI components by leveraging the template's built-in data fetching patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data-fetching hook that populates the dashboard table with mock user analytics data using the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor './src/components/table' to accept dynamic props

steps.title: Final Polish and Responsive Audit
steps.description: Perform a final sweep to ensure all components adhere to responsive breakpoints defined in the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit all pages for mobile responsiveness. Adjust padding and font scaling for screens below 768px using existing utility classes.

pro_tips: Never hardcode colors; always reference your theme.config.ts to maintain global consistency.
Use Claude Code's '--watch' mode to see UI changes in real-time as you refine the Antigravity prompts.
Leverage the Antigravity 'slot' pattern to keep your main page files under 100 lines of code.
Pre-define your 'empty states' and 'loading skeletons' in the template to save hours of edge-case design work.
Always run a build-check after every major component injection to catch layout shifts early.
content.next_steps: Once your UI is live, focus on integrating a headless CMS to allow your clients to manage their own content, further increasing your billable value.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for mediocre designs and start shipping professional-grade SaaS products that command higher rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
